meaning: adj.可耻的,不光彩的,下流的
examples: He made one mistake and his career came to an ignominious end.
Four years ago, he suffered an ignominious first-round exit.
Social media backers take that ignominious episode in stride.
Our marvelous Space Shuttles will be relegated to the ignominious status of dormant hanger queens.
Last weekend, she returned to the site of her ignominious beginning and emerged a star.
